basic_details.job_title: RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT)
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of RGIPT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: CA Inter/ CMA Inter/Master's Degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounts with minimum 55% marks, Minimum 3 years relevant experience in accounts/finance/audit, Hands-on experience in Tally/ERP/Accounting Software and MS Office, Knowledge of UGC/GoI financial rules, GFR, PFMS, GeM
qualification.details: Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts): CA Inter/ CMA Inter/Master's Degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounts with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in accounts, finance, audit, budgeting, or taxation in a Government institution, University, Government-funded educational/research institute, PSU, Autonomous Body, or reputed private sector organization. Hands-on experience in Tally/ERP/Accounting Software with working knowledge of MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Knowledge of UGC/GoI financial rules, GFR, PFMS, GeM, bill processing, scrutiny, and project accounting. Knowledge of typing in English and Hindi on a computer is a must. Proficiency in noting and drafting in English and Hindi.

salary_details.details: Rs. 50,000.00 to Rs. 60,000.00 per month consolidated.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGIPT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RGIPT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts): CA Inter/ CMA Inter/Master's Degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounts with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in accounts, finance, audit, budgeting, or taxation in a Government institution, University, Government-funded educational/research institute, PSU, Autonomous Body, or reputed private sector organization. Hands-on experience in Tally/ERP/Accounting Software with working knowledge of MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Knowledge of UGC/GoI financial rules, GFR, PFMS, GeM, bill processing, scrutiny, and project accounting. Knowledge of typing in English and Hindi on a computer is a must. Proficiency in noting and drafting in English and Hindi.

content_sections.heading: RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 50,000.00 to Rs. 60,000.00 per month consolidated.

content_sections.heading: RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGIPT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) recruitment is 15-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) post at RGIPT.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have CA Inter/ CMA Inter/Master's Degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounts with a minimum of 55% marks and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Interview, and Presentation.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at RGIPT.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the RGIPT Superintendent Grade-I (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of RGIPT or via the direct application link provided in the "Important Links" section.
